query: Fold ds scan into workflow commands so onboarding starts with map, find, and task instead of a required manual scan
slice_title: Document tldr-first launch workflow and two-layer PLAN-to-task model
goal: Record progress for `Fold ds scan into workflow commands so onboarding starts with map, find, and task instead of a required manual scan`.
description: Updated launch docs to make ds tldr the agent front door, document the canonical PLAN/spec versus devspecs/tasks execution workspace model, clarify full ds task versus ds task quick, and add restart shell or IDE install guidance.
